message:
feat(ufunc): accept ellipsis in einsum_path greedy planning

einsum_path previously parsed '.' as literal label chars, producing
bogus output-label sets and stray-dot errors for NumPy-style batch
subscripts. Wired it through the shared resolve_einsum_ellipsis helper
so greedy pair selection sees PUA-placeholder labels for broadcast dims.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
